x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Custom business rules on CSM tables can conflict with Now Assist CSM AI Agent actions.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Review custom Business Rules and Client Scripts on sn_customerservice_case. Test Now Assist CSM with all customizations enabled in sub-production. Consider deactivating or consolidating redundant scripts before Now Assist go-live.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_8e03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c91
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Custom business rules on CSM tables can conflict with Now Assist CSM AI Agent actions.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>CSM Customization Risk</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaBR = new GlideAggregate('sys_script');
    gaBR.addQuery('collection', 'sn_customerservice_case');
    gaBR.addQuery('active', true);
    gaBR.addQuery('sys_created_by', 'NOT IN', 'glide.maint,system,admin,fred.luddy');
    gaBR.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaBR.query();
    var brs = gaBR.next() ? parseInt(gaBR.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaCS = new GlideAggregate('sys_script_client');
    gaCS.addQuery('table', 'sn_customerservice_case');
    gaCS.addQuery('active', true);
    gaCS.addQuery('sys_created_by', 'NOT IN', 'glide.maint,system,admin,fred.luddy');
    gaCS.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaCS.query();
    var cs = gaCS.next() ? parseInt(gaCS.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var risk = brs + cs;
    var actualValue = brs + ' custom BRs + ' + cs + ' client scripts on sn_customerservice_case (risk score: ' + risk + ')';

    if (risk <= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Low CSM customization risk (score: ' + risk + '). Now Assist CSM AI Agent actions are unlikely to encounter conflicts with existing customizations.'
        };
    } else if (risk <= 10) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Moderate CSM customization risk (score: ' + risk + '). Test Now Assist CSM in sub-production before enabling in production to identify conflicts.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'High CSM customization risk (score: ' + risk + '). Extensive customization on sn_customerservice_case increases the risk of conflicts with Now Assist CSM AI Agent actions.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>CSM</module>
<number>CHK0006052</number>
<order>150</order>
<remediation_guidance>Review custom Business Rules and Client Scripts on sn_customerservice_case. Test Now Assist CSM with all customizations enabled in sub-production. Consider deactivating or consolidating redundant scripts before Now Assist go-live.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>8e03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c91</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
